concept: Flickering lights keeping you up at night?
caption: Flickering lights aren't just annoying — they're a warning sign. Loose wiring, overloaded circuits, or outdated panels can put your family at risk. Don't ignore the flickers.
cta: Book a free safety inspection today
visual_prompt: Close-up of a flickering lightbulb in a dark room with warm amber tones, dramatic lighting, residential setting

caption: Still running on a 100-amp panel? Modern homes need 200 amps to handle EV chargers, smart appliances, and HVAC systems. A panel upgrade is the foundation of a future-ready home.
cta: Get a free panel assessment — link in bio
visual_prompt: Brand new 200-amp electrical panel installed in a clean garage, professional finish, bright LED work light illuminating the panel

caption: Your home might be sending you signals that the wiring is outdated. Swipe through to see the top 5 warning signs every San Diego homeowner should know.
cta: Save this post for later!
visual_prompt: Slide 1: Bold title card '5 Signs Your Home Needs Rewiring' on dark navy background with electrical bolt icon. Slide 2: Illustration of a tripping circuit breaker with warning text. Slide 3: Photo of discolored outlet with explanatory caption.

caption: "We called on Monday, and by Wednesday our Tesla was charging in the garage. Incredible service!" — The Martinez Family, Chula Vista. Another happy customer powered up.
cta: Ready to charge at home? DM us
visual_prompt: Happy family standing next to their Tesla in a clean garage with a Level 2 charger mounted on the wall, warm natural lighting

caption: This month only: book a whole-home electrical safety inspection for just $99. We'll check your panel, outlets, and wiring — and give you a detailed report. Spring is the perfect time to get ahead of problems.
cta: Call (619) 555-0199 or book online
visual_prompt: Professional electrician with clipboard inspecting a residential electrical panel, clean uniform, bright modern kitchen in background

caption: This 1970s Federal Pacific panel was a fire hazard hiding in plain sight. We replaced it with a modern 200-amp Square D panel with whole-home surge protection. Safety restored.
cta: Is your panel this old? Schedule an inspection
visual_prompt: Slide 1: Old rusty Federal Pacific electrical panel with exposed wiring, dim garage lighting. Slide 2: Brand new Square D 200-amp panel, clean wiring, bright LED lighting, professional installation.

caption: Thinking about a home EV charger? Here's exactly what the installation process looks like from start to finish. No surprises, just professional work.
cta: Swipe to learn more, then DM for a quote
visual_prompt: Slide 1: Title card 'Your EV Charger Install in 3 Steps' with EV icon on navy background. Slide 2: Electrician assessing electrical panel capacity with multimeter. Slide 3: Finished Level 2 ChargePoint charger mounted on garage wall with green LED indicator.

concept: Licensed and insured — why it matters
caption: Hiring an unlicensed electrician can void your insurance and put your home at risk. We're fully licensed (C-10), bonded, and insured in California. Your safety is non-negotiable.
cta: Verify our license at cslb.ca.gov
visual_prompt: Close-up of a California C-10 electrical contractor license certificate on an office desk, with hardhat and multimeter in background

caption: We don't just talk about great service — our customers do it for us. 127 five-star reviews and counting. Thank you, San Diego, for trusting us with your homes.
cta: See all our reviews — link in bio
visual_prompt: Screenshot-style graphic showing a 5-star Google review with the business name, star rating, and a short review quote on a clean white card with subtle drop shadow

caption: Your panel is the heart of your electrical system. If it's over 20 years old, it's time for a checkup. We're offering free quotes on panel upgrades all month. No obligation, just honest advice.
cta: Tap the link in bio to request your free quote
visual_prompt: Split image: left side shows an electrician's hand pointing at an old panel, right side shows a modern panel with a green checkmark overlay

concept: Power outages and what they really cost
caption: A single power surge can fry your smart TV, computer, and appliances in seconds. The average homeowner loses $1,500+ in electronics from one bad surge. Whole-home surge protection costs a fraction of that.
cta: Protect your home — ask us about surge protection
visual_prompt: Dramatic photo of a dark living room during a power outage with a single candle lit, modern electronics visible in shadow, moody blue tones

caption: This backyard went from pitch black to paradise. We installed low-voltage LED landscape lighting with smart controls. Now they enjoy their outdoor space every evening.
cta: Want this for your yard? Let's talk
visual_prompt: Slide 1: Dark backyard at night, barely visible patio furniture and landscaping, uninviting atmosphere. Slide 2: Same backyard beautifully lit with warm LED path lights, uplighting on trees, and string lights over the patio area.

caption: California's electrical code updates every 3 years. What was fine in 2020 might not pass inspection today. We stay current so your home stays compliant and safe.
cta: Not sure if your home is up to code? We'll check for free
visual_prompt: Electrician reviewing NEC codebook at a workbench with electrical components and tools neatly organized, professional workshop setting

caption: Just wrapped a full electrical retrofit for a 5,000 sq ft restaurant in the Gaslamp Quarter. New LED lighting, updated panels, and energy-efficient kitchen circuits. Another San Diego business powered right.
cta: Commercial project? Get a bid today
visual_prompt: Interior of a modern restaurant with sleek LED pendant lighting, exposed brick walls, and a professional commercial electrical panel visible in the background

caption: Know someone who needs electrical work? Refer a friend and you both get $50 off your next service. It's our way of saying thank you for spreading the word.
cta: DM us your friend's name to claim your $50
visual_prompt: Bright, friendly graphic with two people shaking hands, '$50 OFF' text overlay, clean modern design with the company's brand colors

caption: If you're using power strips daisy-chained together, your home is at risk. Overloaded outlets cause over 5,000 house fires every year. More outlets is the real solution — not more power strips.
cta: Need more outlets? We can add them safely
visual_prompt: Dangerously overloaded power strip with multiple adapters and cords tangled together, warm warning-tone lighting, residential setting

caption: Smart thermostats, voice-controlled lighting, automated blinds — they all need proper wiring. We prep your home's electrical system so every smart device works flawlessly from day one.
cta: Planning a smart home? Start with the wiring — call us
visual_prompt: Modern living room with smart home devices visible: Nest thermostat on wall, smart light switches, voice assistant on counter, clean contemporary design

concept: Meet the team behind the work
caption: Every technician on our team is a licensed journeyman with 5+ years of field experience. Meet the people who keep San Diego homes safe and powered up.
cta: Tap follow to see more of our work
visual_prompt: Slide 1: Team photo of 4 electricians in clean uniforms standing in front of a branded work van, professional and approachable. Slide 2: Individual electrician working on a panel with focus and precision, action shot.

caption: This 1960s La Jolla home just got a complete electrical overhaul: new copper wiring throughout, 200-amp panel, and smart switches in every room. Built for the next 50 years.
cta: Older home? Let's talk about a rewire
visual_prompt: Beautiful mid-century modern home exterior in La Jolla at golden hour, with interior lights glowing warmly through large windows

caption: Electrical emergency? Don't wait. We offer same-day emergency service across San Diego County. Sparking outlets, tripped breakers, power loss — we've seen it all and we fix it fast.
cta: Call our emergency line: (619) 555-0199
visual_prompt: Electrician's work van with emergency lights parked in front of a residential home at dusk, tools visible, urgent but professional atmosphere

concept: High energy bills from old wiring
caption: If your energy bill keeps climbing but your usage hasn't changed, old wiring and an inefficient panel could be the culprit. Electrical inefficiency is money leaking out of your walls every month.
cta: Get an energy efficiency audit — message us
visual_prompt: Homeowner looking frustrated at a high electricity bill at a kitchen table, with visible old-style thermostat and incandescent bulbs in background

caption: Switching from halogen to LED recessed lighting cuts your lighting energy use by 75%. We retrofit your existing fixtures — no drywall work needed. Most homes are done in a single afternoon.
cta: Ask about our LED retrofit packages
visual_prompt: Side-by-side comparison of warm LED recessed lights vs old halogen cans in a modern kitchen ceiling, clean bright photography

caption: Our team just completed advanced EV infrastructure training with Tesla and ChargePoint. We invest in education so you get the most current installation techniques and code compliance.
cta: Trust the certified pros — book with us
visual_prompt: Training classroom setting with electricians studying EV charger components, certificates visible on wall, professional development atmosphere

caption: Just installed 12 Level 2 EV chargers at a Hillcrest condo complex. Each unit has dedicated circuits and smart metering for individual billing. Multi-unit properties are going electric — and we make it happen.
cta: HOA or property manager? Let's plan your EV infrastructure
visual_prompt: Row of sleek EV chargers in an underground parking garage with numbered parking spots, modern condo building, clean and well-lit

caption: We know your weekdays are packed. That's why we offer Saturday appointments for residential work. Same great service, on your schedule.
cta: Book your Saturday appointment — spots fill fast
visual_prompt: Calendar graphic highlighting Saturday with a checkmark, electrician's tools arranged neatly around it, clean modern flat design

caption: Homes built between 1965-1975 often have aluminum wiring — which is 55x more likely to cause a fire than copper. If your home is from that era, a wiring inspection isn't optional. It's essential.
cta: Not sure what wiring you have? We'll find out — free
visual_prompt: Close-up macro shot of old aluminum wiring connections at an outlet box showing signs of oxidation and heat damage, educational tone

caption: San Diego's grid isn't immune to outages. A whole-home standby generator kicks in automatically when power drops — keeping your lights, fridge, and medical equipment running without interruption.
cta: Ask about Generac whole-home generators
visual_prompt: Generac standby generator installed beside a home exterior, clean landscaping around it, power lines visible in background, reliable and sturdy appearance

caption: We're proud to be a certified Schneider Electric partner and authorized ChargePoint installer. These partnerships mean you get factory-backed installations with full manufacturer warranties.
cta: Work with the certified team — contact us
visual_prompt: Professional display of partner logos (Schneider Electric, ChargePoint) alongside the company logo, clean corporate style with premium feel

caption: This month by the numbers: 47 homes served, 15 EV chargers installed, 8 panel upgrades completed, and 0 callbacks. That's the standard we hold ourselves to every single month.
cta: Be part of next month's numbers — book now
visual_prompt: Clean infographic-style graphic with large bold numbers and icons representing homes, EV chargers, panels, and a zero callback badge, dark navy background with accent colors
